title: Virtual Layer Inverse Optimization for Engineering Input Parameter Recommendation: Reproducibility Package

description: Reproducibility package for the manuscript "Virtual Layer Inverse Optimization for Engineering Input Parameter Recommendation." The archive contains Python scripts, UCI-derived CSV datasets, and JSON result logs for the real-data experiments, robotic-arm benchmark, and sequential-update ablation reported in the manuscript.
